description_long: This lounge set consists of two plush, barrel-shaped armchairs upholstered in a soft, pale pink fabric, paired with a low, round coffee table finished in a dark, glossy material. The armchairs feature a continuous, curved backrest and armrest design, creating a cozy, enveloping seating area. Each chair is supported by slender, metallic legs with a subtle outward angle, adding a modern touch and visual lightness. The coffee table is cylindrical, with a smooth, reflective surface and a deep, rich color that contrasts elegantly with the chairs. The overall arrangement suggests a comfortable, intimate seating area suitable for socializing or relaxing in urban parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor lounges. The materials and design evoke a sense of contemporary style and comfort, making the set both functional and visually appealing.
description: A modern lounge set with two pale pink, barrel-shaped armchairs and a dark, glossy round coffee table, featuring curved backs and slender metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing both armchairs facing the viewer with the round coffee table centered between them.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the curved backs of the chairs and the metallic legs, with the coffee table partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both armchairs and the full circular shape of the coffee table.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view from the opposite direction, again emphasizing the chair backs and the table's position.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each chair has a single, thick seat cushion and integrated back and side cushioning forming a continuous, enveloping surface; all cushions appear attached and uniform in size.
attribute_backrest_design: Curved, mid-height backrest forming a smooth, continuous arc with the armrests; no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are curved, integrated with the backrest, and padded for comfort.
attribute_leg_style: Slender, metallic legs with a slight outward angle; legs are straight, tubular, and have a minimalist, modern appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid pale pink fabric with a smooth, matte finish; no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
